name: Old Coast Pickleball Club
description:
Welcome to Old Coast Pickleball! 🏓🌴

Located in the heart of St. Augustine, Florida, Old Coast Pickleball is where community meets competition! With our two pristine indoor courts, we provide a welcoming space for players of all levels to rally, smash, and dink their way to fun and fitness. Whether you're a seasoned pro or a newbie looking to learn the ropes, you'll find a warm, inclusive environment and plenty of opportunities to grow your game.

What makes us special? It's the vibe! At Old Coast Pickleball, we’re all about fun, friendship, and fierce rallies. Join us for casual open play, skill-based leagues, clinics to sharpen your skills, or exciting tournaments that keep the energy high. Plus, our convenient indoor setting means you can play rain or shine!

We’re more than just a club — we’re a community. Come for the pickleball, stay for the people. Let’s play, connect, and create memories together at Old Coast Pickleball! 🎉💪

name: On Top of the World - Recreation
description:
On Top of the World expanded from six (6) courts in 2012, to 29 courts today. Six of the courts are lighted, so residents can enjoy play from daylight to 9pm.

On Top of the World currently has a very popular pickleball resident club that plays regularly and holds an annual tournament every year. The club meets 7 days a week at 8:00 am, with each day being a different level play. Saturday mornings are reserved for teaching new players the sport. Sunday is open to all players. The club is actively working to expand play with other communities.
fees: Private — Guests and members play for free but are encouraged to join the league.

name: Twin Lakes at Avon Park 55+ Community
description:
Welcome Pickleball Players! 🏓☀️ Twin Lakes welcomes players that are 45 years of age and up, as we are a 55+ community with brand new pickleball courts! We have 4 dedicated asphalt courts with permanent lines and nets.

Our newly introduced Free Open Play Saturdays is for all skill levels and currently first come first serve. We will consider reserving the courts for serious players as we go along, but no reservations are taken at this time. 

Signing our waiver is mandatory prior to playing. Please visit the office in the clubhouse any time and we will happily get you signed up! Our office hours are Tuesday-Saturday 9:30AM-5:00PM, Sunday 11:00AM-4:30PM, and we are closed on Mondays. Please call 863-758-0159 if you should have any questions.
